message:
feat(abi): alien-artifact raw ELF host symbol resolver for pthread delegation

Adds host_resolve.rs — a zero-interposition symbol resolver that finds
host glibc function addresses by:
1. Reading /proc/self/maps via SYS_read to find glibc's ELF base address
2. Parsing PT_DYNAMIC program headers in-memory to find DT_SYMTAB/DT_STRTAB
3. Walking the symbol table to match names and compute absolute addresses

This completely bypasses the dynamic linker interposition that makes
dlsym/dlvsym recursion unbreakable. The resolved host pthread_create
is used as the FIRST attempt in native_pthread_create, before any
OnceLock or ELF-file-parsing fallback paths.

Simple thread tests pass. sort/git/du still fail due to more complex
threading interactions (detached threads, thread attributes, TLS reentry).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
